description: Official Rust CLI for the Beeping Platform — data over sound
_comment: SHA256 hash + version + URL are auto-maintained by .github/workflows/auto-update.yml (BEE-1783): every published release of beeping-io/beeping-cli fires a repository_dispatch to this repo which downloads SHA256SUMS for the new tag, regenerates the manifest via scripts/regen-manifest.py, and commits to develop. The canonical structure of this file lives upstream at external/scoop-bucket/bucket/beeping-cli.json in beeping-io/beeping-cli; structural edits should land there first, then transplant here.
